texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: EAST AFRICA RESIDENT RATES IN KSH.
texts.text: EAST AFRICA RESIDENT RATES IN KSH.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: - Check in is at 2.00 p.m and check out is at 11.00 a.m.
texts.text: Check in is at 2.00 p.m and check out is at 11.00 a.m.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: - Children below 5 years sharing with parents are not charged.
texts.text: Children below 5 years sharing with parents are not charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: - Children between 5 to 12 years sharing with parents are charged 50% of the adult rate and 75% of the room rate in their own room.
texts.text: Children between 5 to 12 years sharing with parents are charged 50% of the adult rate and 75% of the room rate in their own room.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: - Swimming is complementary for hotel guests.
texts.text: Swimming is complementary for hotel guests.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Located near Maili Nane along the Meru/Isiolo highway, 15 km from Subuiga, Meru - Isiolo/Nanyuki Juncon, 11 km from Isiolo town, 12 km from Isiolo Internaonal Airport and 8 km from the Lewa Conservancy.
texts.text: Located near Maili Nane along the Meru/Isiolo highway, 15 km from Subuiga, Meru - Isiolo/Nanyuki Juncon, 11 km from Isiolo town, 12 km from Isiolo Internaonal Airport and 8 km from the Lewa Conservancy.
